input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.1.1.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.1.1.2
            TITLE: hybrid powertrains, such as those using electric motors running off stored energy, are

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.1.1.2: Hybrid powertrains, such as those using electric motors running off stored energy, are
IC.1.1.2 Hybrid powertrains, such as those using electric motors running off stored energy, are 
prohibited.

final_answer: Hybrid powertrains, such as those using electric motors running off stored energy, are prohibited.
